name: elixir-phoenix-plugin
description: Claude Code plugin for Elixir/Phoenix development

scripts.lint: markdownlint "**/*.md" --ignore node_modules --ignore docs --ignore reports --ignore analysis --ignore scratchpad --ignore lab/findings
scripts.lint:fix: markdownlint "**/*.md" --fix --ignore node_modules --ignore docs --ignore reports --ignore analysis --ignore scratchpad --ignore lab/findings

author: Oliver Kriska
